Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 

64 
DGNS_CD_CNT 
LABEL: 
Count of Diagnosis Codes 
DESCRIPTION: The count of the number of diagnosis codes included in the stay. 
SHORT NAME: DGNSCNT 
LONG NAME: DGNS_CD_CNT 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
8 
SOURCE: 
NCH 
VALUES: 
— 
COMMENT: 
This field is derived by adding '1' to the count of the other diagnosis codes reported on the last claim 
record included in the stay. The '1' represents the
